title: Add and maintain canonical spec documents (GOAL.md, SPEC.md, DESIGN.md, LAT.md)
description: Create the four root-level canonical documents following popular high-quality repo conventions. GOAL = north star, SPEC = formal methodology contract, DESIGN = skill implementation architecture, LAT = Living Architecture Trace (cumulative cross-project learnings). Update README and ensure they stay in sync with real usage.

title: Align all canonical documents with lat.md + goal-forge + DESIGN.md conventions
description: LAT.md, GOAL.md, SPEC.md, DESIGN.md, and MVA.md need to be authored/maintained following the strict section rules, leading-paragraph discipline, and compilation style from the three reference projects. Ongoing work as real usage produces new material.

title: Apply Heuristics methodology to design MVA.md as first-class peer document
description: The current high-uncertainty architectural problem is: What should MVA.md be, structurally and philosophically, as a first-class heuristic document on equal footing with AGENTS.md, LAT.md, SPEC.md, DESIGN.md, and GOAL.md? Use the full H0-H5 process to design its architecture, content model, relationship to the other documents, and how it should be maintained.

title: Create Grok-native Heuristics skill using /create-skill workflow
description: Use the create-skill Grok skill to produce a polished, packed version of Heuristics suitable for the Grok TUI / ~/.grok/skills/ installation. Adapt the H0-H5 methodology, prompts, and artifact generation for Grok's invocation model and context engineering patterns.

title: Conduct first real Heuristics session on a high-uncertainty architectural problem
description: Select a real, non-trivial problem (novel orchestration, distributed workflow, or cross-cutting governance) and run the full H0-H5 process. Capture learnings, friction points, and refinements to the methodology and templates.

title: Package Heuristics as reusable ECC / Claude Code marketplace skill
description: Prepare the skill for distribution: proper directory layout for ~/.claude/skills/ or ~/.agents/skills/, installation instructions, AGENTS.md compatibility, integration points with bd, thoughtbox, sisyphus, and existing planning tools (ce-plan, blueprint). Consider contributing to ECC marketplace.

title: Initial project setup: AGENTS.md, CLAUDE.md, and workflow instructions
description: Create AGENTS.md following the user's standard template (WHAT/WHERE/HOW, bd usage, landing the plane protocol). Add any project-specific notes for developing the Heuristics skill.

title: Refine phase gates and anti-patterns from real usage
description: After first usage, update phase-gates.md, SKILL.md, and templates based on what felt too strict, too loose, or missing. Pay special attention to the H2 Minimum Viable Stress gate and the H4 throw ritual.
